arts.ttl: Wolverhampton Alerted as Arsenal Continues to Monitor €70M-Rated PSG Transfer Target
arts.sum: Matheus Cunha quickly became a key figure for Wolverhampton Wanderers, showcasing his versatility in various attacking roles. The Brazilian adapted effortlessly to the Premier League, thriving as an attacking midfielder, supporting striker, or even leading the line as a center-forward. Cunha’s standout performances didn’t go unnoticed, with top clubs reportedly keeping a close eye on […] The post Wolverhampton Alerted as Arsenal Continues to Monitor €70M-Rated PSG Transfer Target appeared first on PSG Talk.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland responds to Man City 115 charges question after signing enormous contract
arts.sum: Erling Haaland has become the highest-paid player in England with a new deal he signed on Friday, despite Manchester City still being under the cloud of their legal battle with the Premier League

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland says he ‘hadn’t thought’ about upcoming ruling on 115 charges before committing to new Man City deal
arts.sum: Asked directly if he was happy to have ruled out 15-time European champions Madrid, Haaland said: “I just signed a nine-and-a-half-year deal, so what do you want me to say? Haaland signed an extraordinary new nine-and-a-half year contract with the reigning Premier League champions worth a reported basic £500,000 per week last Friday.

arts.ttl: Man City charges had no impact on new deal - Haaland
arts.sum: Erling Haaland says he is "confident" Manchester City know what they are doing over the charges they face after signing a new long-term deal.

arts.ttl: Tottenham, PSG’s £70M-Rated Target Reveals Transfer Stance Amid Man Utd Exit Rumors
arts.sum: Rúben Amorim’s decision to exclude Alejandro Garnacho from last month’s Manchester derby has fueled speculation about the winger’s future at Manchester United. arts.ttl: Erling Haaland insists he is confident Man City will defeat the Premier League in their seismic hearing over 115 financial charges... after signing new £500,000-a-week five-year deal
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's Manchester City are now unbeaten in six matches across all competitions and look more buoyant after Erling Haaland committed the majority of his career to them.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland never thought about charges before committing to Manchester City
arts.sum: The forward signed a new nine-and-a-half-year contract on Friday.

arts.ttl: Team News: Paris Saint-Germain vs. Manchester City injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Wednesday's Champions League clash between Paris Saint-Germain and Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland loves his massive City contract extension because it is 'a bit unusual'
arts.sum: It’s going to be amazing,” Haaland said ahead of City’s crucial Champions League game against Paris Saint-Germain on Wednesday. The sheer size of it also seems to limit the possibility of him joining an even bigger club like Barcelona or Real Madrid in the years to come, unless one is prepared to pay a fortune.

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish to Manchester United transfer was 'really close' as Man City star makes exit claim
arts.sum: Jack Grealish has been linked with a move away from Man City with rivals Man United said to be monitoring his situation
